creator: Hartmann@FreeBSD.org
text:
Compiling graphics/xv with clang fails with the following error. Use of clang is set up as recommended on the FreeBSD WIKI page for building FreeBSD with clang.

===>  Patching for xv-3.10a_14
===>  Applying distribution patches for xv-3.10a_14
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for xv-3.10a_14
===>   xv-3.10a_14 depends on executable: imake - found
===>   xv-3.10a_14 depends on file: /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/xext.pc - found
===>   xv-3.10a_14 depends on file: /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/x11.pc - found
===>   xv-3.10a_14 depends on file: /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/xt.pc - found
===>   xv-3.10a_14 depends on shared library: jpeg.11 - found
===>   xv-3.10a_14 depends on shared library: tiff.4 - found
===>   xv-3.10a_14 depends on shared library: png.6 - found
===>   xv-3.10a_14 depends on shared library: jasper.4 - found
===>  Configuring for xv-3.10a_14
mv -f Makefile Makefile.bak
imake -DUseInstalled -I/usr/local/lib/X11/config
imake: No such file or directory
imake: Cannot exec clang -E.
  Stop.
imake: Exit code 1.
  Stop.
===>  Building for xv-3.10a_14
`Makefile' is up to date.
make: don't know how to make all. Stop
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/xv.
